description: Sector overlay for banks, credit products, fintechs, payment service providers, digital wallets, money-service businesses, and financial technology documentation in Canada.

metadata.scope: Canada sector overlay controls for Banking and Fintech. Intended to be used with canada_core_control_library.
metadata.source_note: Source basis is mapped from official Canadian federal/provincial/territorial legal/regulatory sources available at rule-pack publication time. This starter pack is not legal advice and requires expert validation before production reliance.
metadata.external_knowledge_policy: No external knowledge is introduced during document evaluation. Regulatory source mappings live only in this versioned rule pack.

primary_sources.name: Retail Payment Activities Act supervisory framework
Proceeds of Crime (Money Laundering) and Terrorist Financing Act and FINTRAC guidance
Personal Information Protection and Electronic Documents Act (PIPEDA)
Baseline Cyber Security Controls for Small and Medium Organizations

rules.title: Payment service provider registration or RPAA scope evidence is present
rules.summary: Checks for payment service provider registration, RPAA scope, Bank of Canada supervision, or payment function evidence.

metadata.evidence_expectation: The reviewed document/document set should contain direct textual evidence for this control, or the engine should return missing/review_required according to the rule strategy.
metadata.review_guidance: A qualified Canadian legal/compliance reviewer must confirm applicability, legal sufficiency, provincial/territorial overlays, and whether absence of textual evidence should be treated as non-compliance.
source_basis: Bank of Canada RPAA registration/supervision framework

rules.title: Operational risk and end-user fund safeguarding evidence is present
rules.summary: Checks for operational risk management, incident response, funds safeguarding, significant change, or annual reporting evidence.

metadata.evidence_expectation: The reviewed document/document set should contain direct textual evidence for this control, or the engine should return missing/review_required according to the rule strategy.
metadata.review_guidance: A qualified Canadian legal/compliance reviewer must confirm applicability, legal sufficiency, provincial/territorial overlays, and whether absence of textual evidence should be treated as non-compliance.
source_basis: Bank of Canada RPAA supervision framework

rules.title: AML/ATF customer due diligence and reporting evidence is present
rules.summary: Checks for FINTRAC compliance program, KYC, suspicious transaction reporting, sanctions/PEP screening, or record keeping evidence.

metadata.evidence_expectation: The reviewed document/document set should contain direct textual evidence for this control, or the engine should return missing/review_required according to the rule strategy.
metadata.review_guidance: A qualified Canadian legal/compliance reviewer must confirm applicability, legal sufficiency, provincial/territorial overlays, and whether absence of textual evidence should be treated as non-compliance.

rules.title: Financial consumer disclosure or complaint-handling evidence is present
rules.summary: Checks for consumer disclosure, complaint handling, fees, credit terms, or Financial Consumer Protection Framework evidence.

metadata.evidence_expectation: The reviewed document/document set should contain direct textual evidence for this control, or the engine should return missing/review_required according to the rule strategy.
metadata.review_guidance: A qualified Canadian legal/compliance reviewer must confirm applicability, legal sufficiency, provincial/territorial overlays, and whether absence of textual evidence should be treated as non-compliance.

rules.title: Financial-data privacy and cybersecurity evidence is present
rules.summary: Checks for personal financial information controls, privacy notices, authentication, encryption, and access control evidence.

metadata.evidence_expectation: The reviewed document/document set should contain direct textual evidence for this control, or the engine should return missing/review_required according to the rule strategy.
